Bash(curl -s -L -o /tmp/zhihu_article.html -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept: text/html,application/xhtml+xml,application/xml;q=0.9,*/*;q=0.8" -H "Accept-Language: zh-CN,zh;q=0.9,en;q=0.8" -H "Referer: https://www.zhihu.com/" "https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/2016838419897165137")

Bash(curl -s -L -o /tmp/zhihu_api.json \\
  -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" \\
  -H "Accept: application/json" \\
  "https://www.zhihu.com/api/v4/articles/2016838419897165137" && head -c 3000 /tmp/zhihu_api.json)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
from selenium.webdriver.support import expected_conditions as EC
import time, json

options = Options\(\)
options.add_argument\('--headless'\)
options.add_argument\('--no-sandbox'\)
options.add_argument\('--disable-dev-shm-usage'\)
options.add_argument\('--disable-gpu'\)
options.add_argument\('user-agent=Mozilla/5.0 \(X11; Linux x86_64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36'\)

driver = webdriver.Chrome\(options=options\)
driver.get\("https://zhuanlan.zhihu.com/p/2016838419897165137"\)
time.sleep\(5\)

# Get the article content
try:
    # Wait for article content to load
    WebDriverWait\(driver, 15\).until\(
        EC.presence_of_element_located\(\(By.CSS_SELECTOR, ".Post-RichTextContainer, .RichText, article"\)\)
    \)
    time.sleep\(2\)
    
    # Get title
    try:
        title = driver.find_element\(By.CSS_SELECTOR, ".Post-Title, h1.Post-Title"\).text
    except:
        title = driver.title
    
    # Get article HTML
    try:
        article = driver.find_element\(By.CSS_SELECTOR, ".Post-RichTextContainer .RichText, .RichText.ztext.Post-RichText"\)
        html_content = article.get_attribute\('innerHTML'\)
    except:
        article = driver.find_element\(By.CSS_SELECTOR, "article, .Post-RichTextContainer"\)
        html_content = article.get_attribute\('innerHTML'\)
    
    print\(f"TITLE: {title}"\)
    print\("---HTML_START---"\)
    print\(html_content\)
    print\("---HTML_END---"\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"ERROR: {e}"\)
    print\("PAGE SOURCE \(first 5000 chars\):"\)
    print\(driver.page_source[:5000]\)

driver.quit\(\)
PYEOF)
